'''âr-k-b-f''' ('''karakbefoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:jar|jar]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| r-k-b-f
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:jar|jar]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âr-k-b-f
|-
! Lemma
| karakbefoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thirakbefoko|thirakbefoko]] || [[word:jirakbefoko|jirakbefoko]] || [[word:shirakbefoko|shirakbefoko]] || [[word:kirakbefoko|kirakbefoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthurakbefoko|thuthurakbefoko]] || [[word:jujurakbefoko|jujurakbefoko]] || [[word:shushurakbefoko|shushurakbefoko]] || [[word:kukurakbefoko|kukurakbefoko]]
|-

|-

|-

|-

|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thorakbefoko|thorakbefoko]] || [[word:jorakbefoko|jorakbefoko]] || [[word:shorakbefoko|shorakbefoko]] || [[word:korakbefoko|korakbefoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thorakbefoko|thorakbefoko]] || [[word:jorakbefoko|jorakbefoko]] || [[word:shorakbefoko|shorakbefoko]] || [[word:korakbefoko|korakbefoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠrakbefoko|thĂŠrakbefoko]] || [[word:jĂŠrakbefoko|jĂŠrakbefoko]] || [[word:shĂŠrakbefoko|shĂŠrakbefoko]] || [[word:kĂŠrakbefoko|kĂŠrakbefoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thatharakbefoko|thatharakbefoko]] || [[word:jajarakbefoko|jajarakbefoko]] || [[word:shasharakbefoko|shasharakbefoko]] || [[word:kakarakbefoko|kakarakbefoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:tharakbefoko|tharakbefoko]] || [[word:jarakbefoko|jarakbefoko]] || [[word:sharakbefoko|sharakbefoko]] || [[word:karakbefoko|karakbefoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:tharakbefoko|tharakbefoko]] || [[word:jarakbefoko|jarakbefoko]] || [[word:sharakbefoko|sharakbefoko]] || [[word:karakbefoko|karakbefoko]]
|}
